title: A Wicked Woman
writer: Florence Ryerson, Zelda Sears, Anne Austin
actors: Mady Christians, Jean Parker, Charles Bickford
plot: Naomi is almost to term with her fourth child when Ed decides to leave taking all their money and the oldest son Curtis. With the sheriff after him, he is in no mood to think of his family. When he struggles with Naomi, he is kill...
